description: Install dependencies and verify the existing project builds cleanly before making changes.
steps: Run `pnpm install` in /projects/sandbox/inventaris-paud to install all dependencies
Run `pnpm lint` to verify no existing lint errors
Run `pnpm build` to verify the project compiles successfully with TypeScript and Next.js
findings: All steps passed cleanly. pnpm install added 359 packages. pnpm lint produced no errors. pnpm build compiled successfully with Turbopack in ~2.1s. TypeScript checks passed. 9 static/dynamic pages generated.
